description_long: This object consists of three slices of sandwich bread, each with a circular cutout in the center filled with a cooked egg, resembling the classic 'egg-in-a-hole' preparation. The bread appears lightly toasted, with a golden-brown crust and a soft, pale interior. The eggs are cooked such that the whites are set and the yolks remain slightly yellow and glossy. The sandwiches are arranged on a round, white ceramic plate, which also holds several slices of fresh red tomato. The plate is placed on a dark wooden surface, giving the scene a homely and inviting appearance. The overall presentation is neat, with the sandwiches fanned out to display their contents clearly.
description: Three egg-in-a-hole sandwiches with golden bread and cooked eggs are arranged on a white plate with sliced tomatoes, set atop a dark wooden surface.
description_view_0: Two sandwiches are angled toward the viewer, with the third at the back, and the tomato slices are clearly visible in the center of the plate.
description_view_1: All three sandwiches are evenly spaced around the plate, with the tomato slices centrally positioned and fully visible.
description_view_2: The left sandwich is raised, showing more of its side, while the other two sandwiches and the tomato slices are visible from a slight angle.
description_view_3: The three sandwiches are symmetrically arranged around the plate, with the tomato slices in the center, viewed directly from the front.
